mapper.sql: id, admin_id, type, account, login_pwd, nick_name, phone, email, status, login_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select a.id, a.admin_id, a.type, a.account, a.login_pwd, a.nick_name, a.phone, a.email, a.status, a.login_time, a.create_time, a.update_time from w_admin_info as a left join w_power_binding as b on b.binding_id = a.id and b.type = 0 where (b.grouping_id = 2 or b.grouping_id = 1) and a.status = 0 group by a.admin_id
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into w_admin_info (admin_id,type, account, login_pwd, nick_name, phone, email, status, login_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{adminId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{type,jdbcType=INTEGER} #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginPwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into w_admin_info
admin_id,
type,
account,
login_pwd,
nick_name,
phone,
email,
status,
login_time,
create_time,
update_time,
#{adminId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{loginPwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},

#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update w_admin_info
admin_id = #{adminId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
account = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
login_pwd = #{loginPwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nick_name = #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
login_time = #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update w_admin_info set admin_id = #{adminId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, account = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, login_pwd = #{loginPwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nick_name = #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, login_time = #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
